# Bayesian modeling and inference with Stan

Source materials for a one-day class taught by @bob-carpenter and
@mitzimorris at the [2026 Modern Modeling Methods
Conference](https://modeling.fordham.edu/2026-modern-modeling-methods-conference/modern-modeling-methods-2026-preliminary-program/)
at Fordham University.

## Bob Carpenter's slides

The top-level directory [`carpenter-slides`](/carpenter-slides)
contains Bob's slides.  You can make them in LaTeX as follows.

```sh
cd carpenter-slides
```

and then

```sh
pdflatex -output-directory=build slides.tex
```

## Stan Playground examples

Click on the example to go to the Stan Playground, where you will be
able to run and modify the example in the browser.

* [Binomial fit and
  prediction](https://stan-playground.flatironinstitute.org/?project=lz-string:-QGlJQxKh7jAiMhTM6GhQQBAAB5QIIAEVVHOdAG0ALqkIA)
